messages.content:
Full-featured 2D top-down racing game.
- Responsive canvas that fills the viewport with sharp rendering.
- Game state management: Menu, Playing, Paused, Game Over.
- Procedurally generated scrolling track with dynamic obstacles.
- Player car with responsive left/right controls (keyboard & touch).
- Scoring system with high score persistence in localStorage.
- Lives system with collision detection and particle effects for crashes.
- Difficulty scaling based on elapsed game time.
- Immersive UI: main menu, in-game HUD, pause screen, and game over screen.
- Basic sound effects using Web Audio API for crashes and score.
- All text and UI elements localized in Russian.
- Custom toast notification system for in-game messages (e.g., new high score).
- Mobile-friendly touch controls.
